temporal_description:

He has a serious, intense expression, with his brow slightly furrowed as he stares intently off-screen. The background is completely black, focusing all attention on his face. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a tense and serious mood, introducing a character who appears to be a figure of authority or intensity.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A rhythmic, percussive sound, like a metronome or a ticking clock, begins, creating a sense of suspense.)
(00:03-00:05) The scene cuts to a different man, who is bald and wears glasses. He is also in a dark, green-lit environment. He looks to his right with a concerned and slightly fearful expression, his mouth slightly open as if he is about to speak or is in the middle of speaking. (Storyline: This cut introduces a second character, whose worried expression contrasts with the first man's stern look, suggesting a shared tension or a confrontation is unfolding.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The rhythmic, percussive ticking continues, heightening the suspense.)
